column1: Hey Vivian, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book
Wordd thats where I'll be too actually. will def hook it up for you
how many ppl in your group so far?
oh bet thats solid for sure! you all from the same school?
dope which school we from? ill hook it up with a good group rate
cool we had a good JMU group last year in Punta. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
Like hopefully we wanna book by next week
yea I feel that. things are def moving quickly right now so the sooner the better
ill add the payment plan in there two which lets you reserve with a deposit and then worry about the rest of the payments later
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to?
Sorry for the late response I fell asleep
Lol all good. I'll send this over in a few
just sent that over lmk if it came through
I can hook it up with a discount on some of the prices you see there too just lmk which one we wanna narrow down on
So if I do the occidental one in punta with 4 in a room it's 646. And then plus 200 plus the 250 so for a total of 1096
Nah not that much. It'll be the 646 + 200 so $846
The 200 and 250 youre seeing is the payment plan. those payments go towards your total
so the 200 deposit reserves your spot on the trip. the 250 is your 2nd payment end of this month. and the balance is your last payment, end of jan
its just so that you dont have to pay the $846 in one shot. spreads it out for you
Wait when is the first payment due
Alright the gang is asking what are the parties how many parties things
is it limited to just people who get this package what is that situation
First payment by Friday. would that work for y'all? that'd get you in with a $50 discount + the booze cruise event for free. so it'd be $796 total

the parties are lit. so, we have 3 nightclubs we host events at off of the resort. Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca. the $200 party pass gets you round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at all 3 events
wait we don't want coco bongo off the resort

Lol all good. we throw parties on the resort too, which come with the base $646 package. those are lit too we have pool parties and beach parties. theres also one nightclub on the resort we host at for a night. its not the most luxurious club but it gets the job done lol
If y'all wanna hop on a call too I'm down just lmk. may be easier
this is the overall vibe tho, this is the occidental punta cana resort and the clubs are the off resort ones https://youtu.be/XbgROM_7E2Y
some clips from the booze cruise in there too
What if we can't book until Tuesday or Wednesday
Could we pretty please still get the discount
Lemme see what I can do
Pretty please do u know how hard it is to get 20 girls on the same page
20 girls who love to party and get live
Yea I know how it is lol, workin on it rn
If I can finesse this tho, need y'all to be the life of the party
Trust me it doesn't get much better then us
Also, we want like the hotel all inclusive package but we don't wanna go to anything off the resort just the booze cruise
Cool I got you. So that'll be just the $646 package, waiting to hear how far out I can extend my $50 discount and booze cruise. The booze cruise is usually $75
Will you and your team be there at the resort
Will be dope to meet y'all
omg yes we want to do a meet and greet with you spiffy
you've never seen a party like us jmu girls party
Lol you will. and yea we need that JMU energy for sure
I got some good news and bad news. which you want first
Wait fine nah I'll tell you the good news first lol

Good news is, I got the green light to extend the discount & booze cruise to next Tuesday. but, we'd just need a couple of you to deposit this weekend so that I can keep the reservation active at the $596 price
Bad news is, meet and greet fee went up this year. inflation is crazy
Lol nah I'm jokin. there was only good news. but lmk if you think a couple of you would be down to get started for the group this weekend
okay let me chat with my friends real quick I'll get back to you asap
We are so hip to this especially with the meet and greet included
Just to get this clear to text the group $596 - all inclusive package, no off resort events but everything else plus booze cruise (and meet and greet)
as long as a few of us can deposit this weekend
Next question: how is the food there I've heard many mixed reviews....
yea yup $596 all inclusive resort package, airport transportation, onsite staff, resort parties, booze cruise etc. all fees taxes included

the food, ill be real at any all inclusive international resort, its like top of the line gourmet food. but honestly its good enough and gets the job done. a lot of the reviews you see may be for the Occidental Caribe which is a diff resort down the strip. Ive stayed a both, the Punta Cana has a lot better food than the caribe
its not like top of the line**
my b lol forgot the not. big emphasis on not
but for perspective I was there for 2.5 weeks last spring and ate just fine every day
No yeah I got what u meant lol
Alright perfect I'll get back to you soon I'm in class
spring break is more important than class wym
lol nah, enjoy yourself. lmk wassup after
wine Wednesday with the girls I'll let you know later
whats good Viv, how we lookin
4 of us would be down to put a deposit down Sunday
Aight cool. So you 4 get the first meet and greet
I'll hit you up tomorrow, will have the ops team get the reservation started
whats goodd, just sent you over the res for tomorrow. discount is added in, and booze cruise added
bet. lmk if you need any help with it tn, I got you
perf spiff sorry we are 100% reserving the rooms it's just taking a bit because everyone is traveling for Thanksgiving and is in different time zones
lol all good, just lmk if anything comes up
yoo Viv don't tell me you forgot to reserve the rooms ln!
bouta get me yelled at lol
spiff we are doing it at 7 pm tonight, everyone wanted to do it at the same time
Like all 20 of us are doing it tn
There was a whole debacle of everyone wants to do it at the same time
like this shit is giving me a headache cause they are so annoying like you should of seen us booking this last year
Thank god we are going through u this year
Lol damn. where'd y'all go last year?
Oh word. this will be a better time fs
I'll let the operations team know whats up and get it all adjusted for tn
Our zoom call is scheduled for 7 pm
Aight word. I'll make sure they put a note on your slot for you to get the first meet and greet
Did u guys have any other jmu people book through u guys for punta
not yet that I know of. through me atleast, I'll check in with the others
we had a pretty big squad last year tho, I know one of them was looking to set things up again at one point. not sure if theyre with y'all already
I'll grab the list for your week. gimme like 5 min
your week def the most lit rn
Yeah our friends last year booked through you guys but then they graduated so I think that's who u were referring to
Aight theres a lot of schools on this list rn too many to text all
Give me 3 of your favorite numbers
Are we allowed to change the dates of the trip
lmk if you 100% want the change
should be updated in the next 60
Wait in room 1, Kylie accidentally clicked two spots can you unreserve the spot that says TBA TBA so our friend can join it lol
that first slot? it should be good now
Okay others are joining the other rooms now too
There are like 3 girls who want to put the first payment down Wednesday is that okay but like they will join a room and such
yea just lmk their 3 names and I'll put the note in on their slots
Also there is this one girl in our group who has a lot of questions before booking can send her your number or give you her number
Yea thats cool, she aight? lol
Yes it's more or less like booking through someone like spring break u
yea she just said she was confused about who we were
Can you remove the temporary reserved TBA person in room 3 and can you move phoebe to room 4
And phoebe and Mary prater won't be able to pay till Wednesday
yo Lauren asked to swap her and Mel's spots, wanted to make sure that was cool w y'all
Wait sorry last thing hate to bug you Ryleigh hedge will be paying tmr Ella marlin & Cameron will be paying Wednesday
Is there a check in time or is it just whenever we get there?

check in is typically after 3. but if rooms are ready when you get there, you're good check in. if rooms arent ready, you're still able to come on the resort and chill - drink, eat, pool, etc until rooms are ready
its gonna take you about an hour / hour and a half from when you land to get to the resort. depending on how long customs and baggage lines are
Ryleigh, Ella, and Cameron are all good. put the note on their accounts. theres a handful more that aint make their deposit tho
Dude bruh I thought they did
Okay I'm texting them now in the gc
Phoebe and Mary are good for weds too actually
Lmk wtw is with Lauren, Alexa, Jane & Kelly so operations team don't tweak on me
just texted them all now lauren is on it rn
but yea get a early-ish flight if you can. that way you can enjoy most of the first day
110 days till meet and greet/bde (best day ever)
Okay so we wanna do a swap and Kelly and Janey will pay tn but is it possible to remove Phoebe completely and then this new girl Ellie is gonna join that room and also pay tn
Literally don't hate us I'm sorry for making everything complicated
But it's fine cause Ellie is joining
tell Ellie go take that spot
Okay bet your actually the best

Another 4 girls want to join the reservation like add another room....but I know you gave us a discount and such....do u want me to tell them to contact you or can you add them to our reservation for a different price or same price
are these girls close with you?
okay wait they said they wanna join but they are so busy rn for thanksgiving and said can they just figure out after tmr 😭😭
So whatever that means so I guess it's a problem for Friday 😭
Lol I mean it takes 2 minutes to hop on the reservation link
I think their out rn that's why
Alright they wanna join the reservation today
should be open now if you want to send them the link
Good fam time. I'm still full
Spiffy can i get an extension to pay my second payment like till tmr night or monday pleaseeeee
yo I got your payment moved to tomorrow
whats the word with the new room we added? saw Isabella C hopped in but didnt make a deposit. and the others just never slid on
Thank you so much l can pay tmr
dude I thought they did or they should of, alright I'm sorry I'll text them rn
Just to clarify like if our reservation is on two seperate flights landing at different times like we still will all have transportation
yea, so once you get your flights and enter the info on your portal, we coordinate pickup times, so everyone will be all good
yo Viv mind telling Jane to lock in
Hey spiffy, some other people want to book through you guys for spreak, not our reservation just like book through you guys, can I just give you their number?
Yea thats cool. they tryna do a diff trip?
Word, they go to JMU too?
Aight bet. I hit them up
ugh annoying all I think about is spreak
But other than that just fine
Word I feel that. you'll get through
it'll be meet and greet time before you know it
happy holidays to you and yours
Did everyone pay like is everything all set?
pretty sure y'all good. will check in a few
Cameron forgot to pay the last part and I think she just is about to do it
Please tell me her trip isn't cancelled🤞🤞🤞
cam is freaking out we don't want her trip canceled🙏 if she pays rn are we good
Yea she's good she can pay this am
So is our entire group all good for spring break then?
Yea y'all good. Ppl can add their flight info onto their accounts if they haven't already

Sorry we have a few questions, 1. How does check in work like how a regular hotel would or? And then 2. For the things that go on, like booze cruise or like pool party whatever when would we know about those?

Yea so soon as y'all land our transportation team will be there to check y'all off, escort you to the shuttle, and bring you to the resort. make sure each person adds their flight details onto their accounts so we can plan their pickup times

once y'all get to the resort our onsite team will be there to help you with check in. each room checks in together. typically rooms are avail after 3, but if you get there early and rooms are ready, you can check in. if rooms arent ready, you can still chill on the resort and drink, eat, pool, until rooms are ready
few weeks before the trip I'ma send y'all an itinerary of whats going on and when. our staff will also give you a breakdwon of what is happening every day during check in
Omg okay perfect thank you so much spiffy

Hey Spiff, u might think I sound crazy right now but...we were wondering if we could add another room or if it's too late. Totally okay though if it's too late we will still have a great time. We are aware it would be a more expensive price but if it is possible lmk but if not totally understandable and we will guarantee still be life of the party
lemme see what I can do
were they lookin to hop in tonight?
And how much would it be
yea the quicker they can tap in the better
Okay how much would it be
for a room of 4 its 646 per person
I got the green light tho so just lmk
Oh we are counting down the days
might just find you a husband
Wait so do u stay at that resort like the entire month
Like for other spring breaks too
yea I'm there for about two and a half weeks
When do we get an itinerary/like things like that
should be sent out soon. if not tomorrow then Tuesday
we got a pretty good lineup
and then you'll get details on how to find our transportation service when you land, etc
this will be in the email too but save this link its an DR e-ticket you'll each have to fill out before you board https://eticket.migracion.gob.do/
Hey spiffy there is a lot of confusion from the girls
I don't know if that makes sense but I just want to make sure we already all paid for the booze cruise
So in the email we just got it mentioned the party package and then when u go into it I guess it says we can add the party package and booze cruise but we already I thought got the booze cruise
hey yea all good. you all have the booze cruise locked in so youre good there
it was a general email sent to everyone in our system letting them know about party passes
Are the outlets different in punta like will my shark hair dryer work there
Yo wanna let these few we need their flight info still Katrina Cameron Erin Jane Lauren Raya
Or if you know if they're on the same flight as anyone else I can have ops team add them in
Okay I'll text them cause I can't remember if they are on my flight
Hey spiffy we are really excited we have 2 questions
What is the water situation? Like in the rooms should we just use like bottle water to brush our teeth and such. Does the resort have like bottled water that we can buy/get?
And how can we make reservations for restaurants in the resort? We heard of people doing it but how do we go about it?

So water, I've used it for brushing teeth and have been fine. But totally up to you. Definitely stick to drinking the bottled water, the cleaning staff gives you a few every time they come by to clean
There's a store on the resort where you can buy mote
I can also slide you a case if I ever run off the resort while you're here
For reservations you make those when you get here. I think they let you do up to 3 at a time. There's a concierge desk where you do it all at. There's a few specialty restaurants that are dope
Awesome thank you spiffy you're the best
Are you gonna party with us?
Wait what's the form thing we have to fill out before we board our flight
The e-ticket. its to travel into the DR
Wait stupid question when I fill It out it asks if I'm traveling with people do I say yes?
otherwise you'll have to fill it out for everyone on one form
Is there an iron in the room?
Vivv safe travels today lmk when y'all get to the resort
Wordd safe travels today lmk when y'all gettin to the resort
Can you have drinks waiting for us???
So how do we get on this booze cruise tomorrow or should we just chat when we get there?!
yea after check in you'll all stop by the party pass desk and get the wristbands for the cruise
do you have a screenshot of your vouchers
yo side note if anyone in your group is already hare and was given the Wednesday booze cruise ticket, let them know we're switching you all to tomorrows cruise. we'll have the DJ set up for that one
any of them that are here already, if you can, let them know to head back to the hospitality desk to switch. have them mention your name and that theyre one of Spiffy's groups
Do we have to bring a towel on the booze cruise?
You can yea if you want to bring a small bag
Don't leave without us we are running to the bus
That booze cruise was the best experience of my life
We are all still talking about it so thank you for such a great time
Damn that means a lot. Glad we were able to get you all on, it was litt. Boat tilting and all
Happy Birthday too, no better way to spend that
That trip was amazing thank you so much
Viivvv glad y'all had a good time. Booze cruise was lit lit
